user_query: How many floats are managed by 'INCOIS'?

attempts.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT float_id) FROM argo_profiles WHERE profile_number = ( SELECT profile_number FROM argo_profiles WHERE float_id = '2902121' AND profile_number IN ( SELECT profile_number FROM argo_profiles ) );
attempts.error:
(psycopg2.errors.CardinalityViolation) more than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression

[SQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT float_id) FROM argo_profiles WHERE profile_number = ( SELECT profile_number FROM argo_profiles WHERE float_id = '2902121' AND profile_number IN ( SELECT profile_number FROM argo_profiles ) );]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)

attempts.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.float_id) FROM argo_profiles a JOIN float_metadata b ON a.float_id = b.float_id WHERE b.float_id = '2902121';
